margin: 0px;"></b>-l newname</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=8;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="544.39" y="31620" width="153.61" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>Default Shell<br style="padding: 0px; margin: 0px;"></b>-s /path/to/shell</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=8;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="736.65" y="31620" width="186" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>User ID<br style="padding: 0px; margin: 0px;"></b>-u UID</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=8;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="960.73" y="31620" width="132.92" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>Primary Group<br style="padding: 0px; margin: 0px;"></b>-g GROUP</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=8;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1132.27" y="31620" width="186" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>Supplementary Groups<br style="padding: 0px; margin: 0px;"></b>-G GROUP1,GROUP2</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=8;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="547.03" y="31710" width="252.5" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>Home Directory<br style="padding: 0px; margin: 0px;"></b>-d /path/to/home</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=8;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="859.25" y="31710" width="198.78" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>Comment/GECOS<br style="padding: 0px; margin: 0px;"></b>-c 'Full Name'</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=8;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1117.8" y="31710" width="203.7" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>Account Expiration<br style="padding: 0px; margin: 0px;"></b>-e YYYY-MM-DD</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=8;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="546" y="31800" width="203.7" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>Account Locking<br style="padding: 0px; margin: 0px;"></b>-L / -U</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=8;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="832" y="31800" width="203.7" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>Move Contents<br style="padding: 0px; margin: 0px;"></b>-m (with -d)</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=8;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1117.8" y="31800" width="203.7" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" value="<font style="font-size: 20px;" face="Verdana"><b>User Account Attributes</b></font>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="541.5" y="31570" width="271.5" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana">usermod</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=13;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="254" y="31690" width="120" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="16" value="" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;" edge="1" source="15" target="3" parent="1"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="710" y="31800" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="760" y="31750" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="17" value="<font style="font-size: 22px;" face="Verdana"><b style="">How usermod Modifies User Accounts</b></font>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="587.2199999999999" y="31500" width="474" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
